headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and emphasis numbers.

body.usage: Use for forms, table data, subtitles, and general UI text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Control Room layout for dashboards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#e94560] text-white hover:bg-[#f25a74] transition-all font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#141418] border border-[#2a2a35] text-[#f8f8f8] hover:bg-[#1e1e24] transition-all rounded-lg px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0c0c0f]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#2a2a35] px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

auth.layout: Centered flex container, min-h-screen bg-[#0c0c0f]. Add a subtle radial gradient blob behind the card using the accent color (#e94560) at 10% opacity for depth.
auth.card: Use standard card component. Clean Email/Password inputs, solid primary button taking full width.

dashboard.header: Logo using a Video/Play icon colored in #e94560. App name 'Music Video Factory' in Outfit font. Settings icon aligned right.
dashboard.stats_bar: Flex row, items centered, separated by subtle borders or dots. Use the primary color #e94560 for numbers to create visual emphasis.
dashboard.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. 'Control Room' dense layout.
dashboard.empty_state: Min-height 300px, border-2 border-dashed border-[#2a2a35] rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-[#8b8b99]. Include a Lucide video/film icon.

settings.layout: Max-width 800px, mx-auto, vertical stack with gap-8. Each section is a separate card.
settings.api_keys: For each key: label, masked input, save button, and status icon (Check/X). Checkmark in #10b981, X in #ef4444.
settings.cost_tracker: Shadcn Table component. Clean borders (#2a2a35), muted headers (#8b8b99).
settings.providers: RadioGroup component. Selected state must have a border ring of #e94560.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, premium tech look.

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. Do not use generic grays; use the precise hex codes: Background #0c0c0f, Cards #141418, Accent #e94560, Border #2a2a35.
Implement 'Outfit' for headings and 'Inter' for body text via Google Fonts in your layout/CSS.
Ensure all cards use 1px solid borders (#2a2a35) without drop shadows to maintain the clean, flat tech look.
Use lucide-react for all icons. Represent the 'Music Video Factory' logo with a Video or Play icon in #e94560.

For the Auth page, create a subtle glowing background effect using a radial gradient with #e94560 at low opacity (e.g., bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-[#e94560]/10 to-[#0c0c0f]).
Implement the 'Cost Tracker' as a clean Shadcn Table inside the settings page. Make sure the total row stands out.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, inputs, links, and forms for reliable testing.
